title: Daily reminder toggle has no effect on notification scheduling
description: `refresh(dueCount:)` always schedules the recurring N1 notification whenever due cards exist, but it never checks the `loro.notifyDaily` setting. The settings UI exposes a 'Daily reminder' toggle, so users can disable it in UI yet still continue receiving reminders.
recommendation: Read `loro.notifyDaily` inside `MemoryCardNotificationService.refresh`; if disabled, remove pending N1 requests and return without scheduling.

title: Auto-advance setting is never honored by the session player
description: The settings screen stores `loro.autoAdvance`, but `SRSPlayerView` unconditionally calls `advance()` after each completed visit. This makes the toggle misleading and non-functional.
recommendation: Gate `advance()` behind the persisted `loro.autoAdvance` flag and provide a manual 'Next word' action when auto-advance is disabled.
